intent_summary: Integrate Field Monitor vendor tier into Blog sub-hub as Signal Sweep — continuous URL monitoring for company press/about pages. field_monitor.* tables are vendor staging layer. Seeds 100 URLs from vendor.blog (WHERE source_type IN press_page, about_page) into field_monitor.url_registry. Bridge module in hub Middle layer reads detected content changes from vendor tier and feeds into existing blog pipeline via ingest_article(). Sample-gated to 100 records.
vendor_tier: field_monitor.* (same tier as vendor.people, vendor.blog, vendor.ct)
depends_on: tf-linkedin-01 (build Talent Flow first, validate pattern, then replicate here)
go_condition: Seed SQL runs clean (100 url_registry rows, 300 field_state rows). Parser KV entries created. change_bridge.py imports clean and feeds into ingest_article(). Kill switches halt execution. pipeline.md updated.

agent_routing.db_agent: Run seed_blog_urls.sql against Neon. Verify 100 url_registry rows, 300 field_state rows. Idempotent.
agent_routing.builder: Create signal_sweep/ directory, url_seeder.py, change_bridge.py, parser_templates.py, seed scripts, update pipeline.md. All logic in Middle layer.
agent_routing.auditor: Same audit pattern as Talent Flow — CTB, IMO, vendor tier, kill switches, no downstream modifications.

constraints: Do not expand scope beyond allowed_paths
Do not modify existing blog_node_spoke.py, ingest_article.py, classify_event.py, or emit_bit_signal.py
field_monitor.* is vendor tier — bridge READS only, never writes
Seed source is vendor.blog (NOT dropped company.company_source_urls)
All logic in hub Middle layer
Kill switches KILL_SIGNAL_SWEEP and KILL_BLOG_URL_SEED enforced
